claim_bullets.bullet_text: I’m very conservative about books, and would be first in line to buy a book scented like a used book store (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.14‑29).
Reg sent me a copy of his book and I was humbled (might be skeptical?) (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.14‑29).
I was skeptical about releasing JavaScript Allongé as an ongoing ebook with a pay‑what‑you‑want model (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.14‑29).

source_record_text: Forewords to the first edition of JavaScript Allongé. The author, a lifelong bibliophile, expresses a conservative attitude toward books, initial skepticism about the pay‑what‑you‑want model, and praise for Reg’s generosity and the Leanpub iterative feedback loop (raw/javascriptallonge.pdf p.14‑29).
